description: Every agent action is recorded in a single pane: the query, the response, the context it used, its chain-of-thought, and the policy that drove it. Rendered conversationally in Ultra — not as raw Grafana — so any action can be explained against the rule behind it.

Routing is driven by cost and data sensitivity together. Deterministic logic flags fields first, the in-environment SLM verifies sensitivity, then a cost gate decides stay-in-SLM or route-to-LLM. Sensitive member data never leaves the NFCU environment.

The KAG knowledge graph is the source of truth for what is sensitive and where it originated. Field nodes link to their source system and to the policy node that governs them. The agent queries it to drive the routing decision — the graph is re-rendered in Ultra, never shown as the raw Neo4j browser.

Cost is measured and controlled per query and per person. Token split between the SLM and the LLM, semantic cache hit rate, and savings versus LLM-only processing are tracked over time — proving sovereignty routing is also the cheaper path.
